name: servalsheets
description: Production-grade Google Sheets MCP server with 25 tools and 407 actions
long_description: ServalSheets is a production-grade MCP server for Google Sheets with 25 tools and 407 actions. Features OAuth 2.1, MCP sampling, elicitation, tasks, and advanced data operations.

OAUTH_CLIENT_ID.title: OAuth Client ID
OAUTH_CLIENT_ID.description: Google desktop-app OAuth client ID. Required for this self-hosted release unless your packaging step injects bundled credentials.

OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET.title: OAuth Client Secret
OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google desktop-app OAuth client secret. Required for this self-hosted release unless your packaging step injects bundled credentials.

OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI.title: OAuth Redirect URI
OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI.description: Redirect URI for the local OAuth flow.

GOOGLE_TOKEN_STORE_PATH.title: Token Store Path
GOOGLE_TOKEN_STORE_PATH.description: Path to the encrypted OAuth token store file.

ENCRYPTION_KEY.title: Token Store Encryption Key
ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: 64-character hex key used to encrypt stored OAuth tokens.

OAUTH_SCOPE_MODE.title: OAuth Scope Mode
OAUTH_SCOPE_MODE.description: Requested Google OAuth scope set (`full` or `minimal`).

tools.name: sheets_advanced
tools.description: Named ranges, protected ranges, tables, banding, smart chips, named functions (31 actions)

tools.name: sheets_agent
tools.description: Autonomous multi-step agent: plan, execute, rollback workflows (8 actions)

tools.name: sheets_analyze
tools.description: Scout, comprehensive analysis, formula health, suggestions, auto-enhance (26 actions)

tools.name: sheets_appsscript
tools.description: Google Apps Script: create, run, deploy, manage triggers (19 actions)

tools.name: sheets_auth
tools.description: Authenticate with Google OAuth2 (login, logout, status, refresh) (5 actions)

tools.name: sheets_bigquery
tools.description: BigQuery integration: connect, query, import/export data (17 actions)

tools.name: sheets_collaborate
tools.description: Sharing, permissions, comments, version history (41 actions)

tools.name: sheets_composite
tools.description: Multi-step workflows: import CSV/XLSX, generate sheets, audit, publish reports (21 actions)

tools.name: sheets_compute
tools.description: Server-side computation: statistics, regression, forecasting, DuckDB SQL (16 actions)

tools.name: sheets_confirm
tools.description: Interactive confirmation wizards for destructive operations (5 actions)

tools.name: sheets_connectors
tools.description: Live external API data connectors: configure, query, subscribe (10 actions)

tools.name: sheets_core
tools.description: Spreadsheet and sheet management (create, list, add/delete/copy sheets, metadata) (21 actions)

tools.name: sheets_data
tools.description: Read, write, append, find/replace, batch operations, cross-spreadsheet federation (25 actions)

tools.name: sheets_dependencies
tools.description: Formula dependency graph, impact analysis, scenario modeling, what-if analysis (10 actions)

tools.name: sheets_dimensions
tools.description: Rows and columns: insert, delete, resize, hide, freeze, sort, filter views (30 actions)

tools.name: sheets_federation
tools.description: Remote MCP server calls and cross-service workflows (4 actions)

tools.name: sheets_fix
tools.description: Data cleaning: clean, standardize formats, fill missing, detect anomalies (6 actions)

tools.name: sheets_format
tools.description: Cell formatting, conditional rules, data validation, sparklines, batch format (25 actions)

tools.name: sheets_history
tools.description: Undo/redo, snapshots, timeline, diff revisions, restore cells (10 actions)

tools.name: sheets_quality
tools.description: Data validation, conflict detection, quality checks (4 actions)

tools.name: sheets_session
tools.description: Active spreadsheet context, preferences, checkpoints, pipeline execution (31 actions)

tools.name: sheets_templates
tools.description: Save, list, apply, and import reusable sheet templates (8 actions)

tools.name: sheets_transaction
tools.description: Atomic multi-operation transactions with rollback support (6 actions)

tools.name: sheets_visualize
tools.description: Charts and visualizations: create, update, delete, suggest chart types (18 actions)

tools.name: sheets_webhook
tools.description: Webhooks and change notifications: register, watch, trigger (10 actions)
